subcodes.first_line: The ocean of bounty is surging, and the sun of grace is manifest and resplendent, yet most among mankind neither perceive nor comprehend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دریای عنایت مواج و آفتاب کرم مشرق و لائح ولکن اکثری از خلق ندیدند و ادراک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
